allow: PowerShell($user = "C:\\Users\\jiawe"; $results = @\(\); $dirs = Get-ChildItem $user -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $d.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $results += [PSCustomObject]@{ Folder = $d.Name; GB = [math]::Round\($size/1GB, 2\) } }; $results | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\jiawe\\VirtualBox VMs" -Directory | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size \(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell($envPath = "C:\\Users\\jiawe\\Anaconda3\\envs"; Get-ChildItem $envPath -Directory | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size \(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB,2\)}} | Sort-Object 'Size \(GB\)' -Descending)

PowerShell($envPath = "C:\\Users\\jiawe\\Anaconda3\\envs"; $results = @\(\); foreach \($d in \(Get-ChildItem $envPath -Directory\)\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $d.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $results += [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$d.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)} }; $results | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($d in \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\jiawe" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $d.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $results += [PSCustomObject]@{Folder=$d.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)} }; $results | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Where-Object {$_.GB -gt 0.1} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($d in \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\jiawe\\Documents\\WeChat Files" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $d.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $results += [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$d.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)} }; $results | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
